prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、 电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度为高热推荐或推荐，西北大学物理类招生涵盖计算机科学与技术（人工智能实验班）、软件工程、人工智能、集成电路设计与集成系统 等热门方向；河北省2026年普通高考总人数约60.98万，较2025年（历史类+物理类约60.68万）略有增加，按近年物理类占比约60%估算，物理类考生约36.6万，竞争基数微增；省 控线物理类本科批从2021年412分升至2025年459分，整体呈上升趋势；西北大学位于陕西省西安市，属西部211高校；该校在河北省招生占比约2.3%–3.0%（2025 年约3.0%），跨省招生比例稳定，无明显地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年物理类大幅扩招35.7%对竞争压力的缓解作用、计算机/电子信息等 热门专业对报考的吸引力、以及声誉偏负面和考生总数微增的有限影响，考虑专业热度吸引更多考生报考使竞争略加剧，预测2026年物理类最 低位次约33983名，区间33483–34483名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 14703 → 18065 → 21159 → 23707 → 27821, continuously declining for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative decline of about 13118 places and an average annual decline of about 3300 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 27821, with a significantly accelerated decline in the last 3 years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 35 in 2021, 46 in 2022, 39 in 2023, 47 in 2024, and 56 in 2025, showing an overall expansion trend; the 2026 plan sharply increases to 76, an expansion of about 35.7% compared to 2025, significantly increasing enrollment slots, which alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University main ranking is about 70th (2026), with recent rankings stable in the 64–70 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving the plagiarism accusation against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Liberal Arts, with the university having established a special task force for investigation; Douyin popularity ranking is 81st, with an evaluation of average, comprehensive popularity of about 289,000, and short video exposure at a medium-low level; no obvious enrollment gaps or breaks have been recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Geology received an A, Archaeology received an A, and Software Engineering received an A-; among these, Software Engineering is directly related to Physics Category enrollment majors (Software Engineering, Computer Class, etc.), which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Class, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have high social popularity as highly recommended or recommended; Northwest University's Physics Category enrollment includes popular directions like Computer Science and Technology (Artificial Intelligence Experimental Class), Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, and Integrated Circuit Design and Integration System; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Hebei Province general college entrance examination is about 609,800, a slight increase from 2025 (History Category + Physics Category about 606,800); based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 60%, Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 366,000, with a slight increase in the competition base; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch rose from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, showing an overall upward trend; Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, a western 211 university; its enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is about 2.3%–3.0% (about 3.0% in 2025), with stable cross-provincial enrollment proportions and no obvious regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous decline in historical rankings, the alleviation of competitive pressure due to the 35.7% expansion in Physics Category in 2026, the appeal of popular majors like Computer/Electronic Information to applicants, and the limited impact of negative reputation and slight increase in total candidates, taking into account that popular majors attract more applicants and slightly intensify competition, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 33983, with a range of 33483–34483.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 33483–34483, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 popular majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 33000), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors like Computer Science and Technology (Artificial Intelligence Experimental Class) and Software Engineering; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., around 34500), mainly choose Tier 2 majors such as Mathematics Class, Physics Class, and Intelligent Science and Technology, supplemented by Tier 3 majors like Economic Statistics and Information Management and Information Systems as safe choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2313 → 2445 → 3109 → 2764 → 6980. The first four years fluctuated narrowly within the 2313–3109 range, but in 2025, there was a significant drop to 6980, an increase of 4216 positions compared to 2024, indicating abnormal fluctuation. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 6980. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province was 27 students in 2021, 29 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 17 in 2025, showing a continuous contraction trend. The 2026 plan is 16 students, a slight reduction of about 5.9% compared to 2025, with limited contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranks approximately 70th, with recent rankings stable in the 64–70 range, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to the plagiarism accusation against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Literature, for which the university has established a special working group to investigate. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 81st, with an average evaluation, comprehensive popularity of about 289,000, and short video exposure at a medium-low level. No obvious record of enrollment gaps has been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Archaeology was rated A, Geology A, and Software Engineering A-. Among these, Archaeology directly corresponds to the enrollment major (Archaeology Digital Archaeology Innovation Experimental Class), which has strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature have a recommended social popularity. Northwest University's History Category enrollment includes popular directions like Law (Smart Law Innovation Experimental Class), Chinese Language and Literature (Artificial Intelligence and Writing Experimental Class), and Economics (National Top-Notch Student Training Base). In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Hebei Province general college entrance examination is approximately 609,800, a slight increase from 2025 (History Category + Science Category about 606,800). Estimating the History Category proportion at about 40% in recent years, there are about 244,000 History Category candidates, roughly flat, with an overall upward trend. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, a western 211 university. Its enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is about 2.3%–3.0%, with stable cross-provincial enrollment proportions and no obvious regional preference changes.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Considering the abnormal ranking drop in 2025 for History Category (possibly due to major group settings or accidental factors that year), the slight enrollment contraction of only 5.9% in 2026, the appeal of advantageous disciplines like Archaeology A for related majors, and the application popularity of hot majors like Law/Chinese Language, and taking into account the correction pressure after the 2025 abnormal fluctuation (ranking number decreases), it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 6534, with a range of 6034–7034.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 6000), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 advantageous majors like Law (Smart Law Innovation Experimental Class) and Archaeology (Digital Archaeology Innovation Experimental Class). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 7000), you should mainly choose Tier 2 Business Administration, supplemented by Tier 3 Philosophy and Public Administration as safe options.
